item.title: Basic OpenGL Renderer
item.description: A C/C++ OpenGL renderer experiment with textured elements, renderable entities, and batch rendering. The README notes rendering 100,000 textured quads with animated colors at 30+ FPS on an M1 Pro MacBook Pro.

item.title: Streaming platform and media CMS
item.description: Worked on an end-to-end video pipeline and streaming platform solution for Vimond, covering CMS workflows, cloud services, internal APIs, search, scheduling, curation, monetization, subscriptions, and multi-platform playback surfaces.

item.title: Video ingest and internal management tools
item.description: Building internal tooling for DPA in Germany, focused on video ingest workflows, Mimir integration, monitoring, and management tools using Vue.js and AWS Lambda.

item.title: pnGo
item.description: A small PNG decoding experiment in Go that reads a limited subset of PNG files and writes PPM output.

item.title: Scheduling workflow improvement
item.description: Worked on BloodConnect for a brief period, improving scheduling workflows with attention to performance and cost.

item.title: Android and real-time communication
item.description: Worked on Android applications using Java and Kotlin, including video chat features with WebSocket and WebRTC technologies.

item.title: miniScreenKey
item.description: A tiny transparent on-screen key overlay for Windows, implemented as a single C file using Win32 APIs and GDI.

item.title: Rust ray tracer
item.description: A Rust ray tracer following Ray Tracing in One Weekend.

item.title: Legacy OpenGL code generator
item.description: A browser-based shape drawing tool that generates legacy OpenGL C/C++ code for static sketches.

item.title: OPFExplorer
item.description: A browser file explorer experiment using the Origin Private File System API, written in plain JavaScript.

item.title: Tile Map Creator
item.description: A web app for visually creating simple 2D tile maps and exporting map files for small games.

item.title: FxApi
item.description: A lightweight JavaFX API client built as an alternative to heavy Electron-based clients.

item.title: wordlep
item.description: A browser extension proof of concept that suggests words while solving Wordle.

item.title: Terminal graphics experiments
item.description: A group of Rust terminal rendering experiments, including an ASCII raycaster and a spinning 3D cube.

item.title: Raycasting in React
item.description: A React-based raycasting experiment where the rendered world is composed from DOM elements.

item.title: Additional public work
item.description: Older projects, learning exercises, and smaller public repositories.

item.title: About
item.description: A short bio and contact details.
